name: Quick Links Golf Simulator Installer
about: Quick Links Golf Simulator Installer is an independent authorized reseller specializing in custom golf simulator solutions for home and garage spaces. They offer a consultative approach, helping clients navigate various technology brands to find the best fit for their specific space, needs, and budget. Their services range from DIY packages to fully custom installations, including design, build, and professional setup, with a focus on projects from backyard sheds to high-end custom homes.
why_golfers_like_it: Customized solutions tailored to your specific space and budget
Independent expertise across multiple simulator technology brands
Professional installation and training included with full packages
Local, ongoing service and support for the life of your simulator
Flexible options from DIY to fully custom-built golf rooms

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, likely BYOB.
No alcohol service mentioned, likely BYOB.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to use your own golf clubs when using a simulator at home.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The service is for in-home installation; food and drink policies would depend on the homeowner's personal rules.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time depends on the software used and the number of players, but typically ranges from 2 to 3 hours for 18 holes on a simulator.

faq.question: Is the simulator kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, golf simulators are suitable for players of all ages, including juniors and youth, making them a great family-friendly activity.
